title: apolgusa taurica
intro: Apolgusa taurica, also known as Tauricapa or Autumn Sage, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central and South America. The leaves and flowers of Apolgusa taurica contain high levels of antioxidants and have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Apolgusa taurica can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", apolgusa taurica (also known as Alpinae Oxyphyllae Fructus) benefits include its ability to inhibit neuroinflammation, amyloids-β (Aβ) deposition, and hyperphosphorylated tau proteins, which may attenuate learning and memory impairment associated with Alzheimer's disease.
